title: Conveyor controller with analytics system
abstract: A data analytics system (1100) has been developed for conveyor (205) systems that helps to monitor items along conveyors as well as assist in monitoring the status or health of equipment of the conveyor (205). Tracking items in conveying systems within a facility can be difficult. Conveyed items can become jammed, lost, or even fall off the conveyor (205), Based on input from motors and sensors along the conveyor (205), the data analytics system (1100) is able to detect lost or jammed items. With input from tire sensors, the data analytics system (1100) is also configured to delect equipment wear and damage. The data analytic system further aggregates data from the various conveyor (205) systems to generate statistics as well as other information that can be used for modeling and simulating the conveyor system (100, 200). The aggregate data can be used to generate measures such as travel efficiency analytics for reporting purposes.
claims: Claims What is claimed is; 1 , A system, comprising: a conveyor system including a conveyor; and a data analytics system configured to monitor conveyor status of the conveyor system, 2, The system of claim 1, wherein the conveyor system includes a conveyor controller that controls a conveyor zone. 3, The system of claim 2, wherein the conveyor controller includes a controller card. 4, The system of claim 2, wherein the conveyor zone includes a conveyor motor that provides mechanical power for moving one or more items along the conveyor zone, 5, The system of claim 4, wherein the conveyor motor includes a motorized drive roller. 6, The system of claim 4, wherein the conveyor controller is configured to measure an electrical property of the conveyor motor to determine the conveyor status. 7, The system of claim 6, wherein the electrical property includes an electrical profile. 8, The system of claim 7, wherein the electrical profile includes a current spike. 9. The system of claim 8, wherein the electrical profile includes duration of the current spike. 10. The system of claim 8, wherein the electrical profile is indicative of item weight, 11.
